title: Why Northeast Florida Businesses Are Switching to Video Retainers
excerpt: One video doesn't solve a content problem. Here's why organizations are moving from project-based to retainer video relationships — and why they don't go back.
author: diego-cerquera

hero.alt: Corporate video production in St. Augustine

content.caption: A retainer relationship means your production team knows your brand inside out
